title: aristida fragilis
intro: Aristida fragilis, also known as brittle grass, is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae and is native to Australia. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Aristida fragilis include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve wound healing, as well as its ability to protect against oxidative stress. The plant is typically prepared for medicinal use through infusions or decoctions, which can be used to treat various health conditions, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness.
